description_long: This is a classic cruiser-style motorcycle with a low-slung frame and a deep, contoured seat designed for comfort on long rides. The body is predominantly a rich, dark red color with black accents on the engine, exhaust pipes, and wheels. Chrome details are visible on the handlebars, mirrors, and exhaust, adding a touch of shine and contrast to the overall look. The motorcycle features a rear backrest for the passenger, large fenders, and spoked wheels, typical of cruiser models. The front of the bike is equipped with dual mirrors, a round headlight, and turn signals, while the rear includes a taillight, license plate holder, and side reflectors. The overall design suggests a robust, heavy-duty build suitable for both city streets and longer highway journeys.
description: A classic cruiser motorcycle with a deep red body, black and chrome accents, spoked wheels, and a comfortable seat with a rear backrest.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, deep red body, black engine, chrome exhaust, and rear backrest.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the handlebars, dual mirrors, round headlight, and front fender.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same cruiser features, with visible exhaust and engine details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the taillight, license plate holder, rear fender, and backrest.
